title: Validate @fmmenchi/ui themes
description: Validates [data-theme] CSS files against the INSTALLED @fmmenchi/tokens contract (completeness, parsable colors, sRGB gamut, WCAG contrast on every declared pair).

themes.description: Workspace-relative paths of the theme CSS files to validate.

tokensPath.description: Advanced: explicit path to @fmmenchi/tokens' validate module (when it cannot be resolved from the workspace root).
